title: The wreck, second time
why.not-closed: Something is open and never closed — or closed in the wrong place. Go from top to bottom, tag by tag.
why.fake-list: Somewhere there is something that LOOKS like a list without being one. Remember the lesson with the dashes?
why.two-h1: The hierarchy is wrong. One of the headings claims to be about the whole page, and it is not.
why.no-quote: Someone else's words are standing as if they were yours. Quotation marks are not a tag.
blocks.0.text: A wreck again. But this time I am not telling you what you are looking for.
blocks.1.text: The page on the right is broken in several places. Different mistakes, from different lessons. You have learned all of them.
blocks.2.text: I will not tell you how many
blocks.3.text: The first time I told you "four things are missing, all of the same kind". That was a hint. Now there is none.
blocks.4.text: The tests are hidden. They will only tell you that something is wrong — and roughly where to look. They will not point at the line.
blocks.5.text: How to read someone else's code
blocks.6.text: Do not hunt for errors. Read the code and ask of each thing: "does this truthfully say what it IS?". A list that is not a list. A heading that is not the main one. A quote that is only quotation marks.
blocks.7.text: Half the bugs in real code are not syntax. The code works. It just lies.
blocks.8.text: Open the preview and compare it with what it should be. The differences will hint at the rest.
